notes: Endpoint FALSE is the honest observed residual: floor evicts the skills listing, but this machine's user CLAUDE.md names the graphify skill and the model reported it. Floor is a skills+server floor; prompt/memory eviction is M2b (unratified). Lab-container runs without a skill-naming user CLAUDE.md observe NONE (matrix T2).

skillInvocation null: stream-json invocation instrumentation is a follow-up (M2). Curated re-admission via --setting-sources project + --plugin-dir (T8; T6 negative on 2.1.215). Residual: bundled CLI skills listed alongside heaven-set:impeccable.

T9b floor route: --disable-slash-commands + zero-server + --setting-sources project + CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BUNDLED_SKILLS=1. Endpoint FALSE, honest: the model listed built-in CLI slash commands (/help, /code-review, /fast, /loop). Those are not skills — they survive suppression on 2.1.215 (CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_POLICY_SKILLS does NOT remove them, matrix T10 negative), are present in every arm including vanilla, and get listed intermittently (4/4 companion unrecorded runs observed NONE). The skills listing itself was evicted; the earlier graphify user-CLAUDE.md residual is gone (--setting-sources project). Env knob undocumented, string-probed from the 2.1.215 binary.

T9b floor route, repeat 1 (same composition as repeat 0). Built-in CLI slash commands remain visible in every arm on 2.1.215 and are intermittently listed by the model — floor probes assert ^NONE$ and keep failing runs as honest evidence (matrix T10).

skillInvocation null: stream-json invocation instrumentation is a follow-up (M2). T9 curated route (supersedes T8 per owner veto): --setting-sources project + --plugin-dir + CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BUNDLED_SKILLS=1. Observed listing = heaven-set:impeccable ONLY — bundled-CLI-skills residual eliminated. skillInvocation null: stream-json instrumentation is a follow-up (M2).
